name: Browser-Use
description: E2E verification, UI automation, and regression testing using high-level natural language browser commands.
instructions_markdown:
# Browser-Use Subagent — Workspace Factory Prompts

Copy one of these prompts when invoking the **browser-use** subagent.

---

## Project flow

```
Login to dashboard at localhost:3001, navigate to Workspaces, create a workspace, switch to it, then verify session cookie and nav state.
```

---

## i18n / RTL check

```
Toggle locale (AR/EN) on login page and verify RTL layout and labels.
```

---

## Regression pass

```
Login as [role], navigate to [pages], verify [behaviors], and capture screenshots for any broken states.
```

---

## Data verification

```
Login at localhost:3001, go to Records, apply filters, click Export CSV, verify file downloads.
```

---

## Auth redirect

```
Visit protected route without auth, verify redirect to login. Login, verify redirect back.
```
